# Corvix SEO Platform

Full-service SEO optimization and visibility engine for modern web applications.

## Core Features
- AI Search Optimization (GEO/AEO)
- Technical SEO Audits
- Schema Markup Generation
- Automated Keyword Research
- Content Gap Analysis

## Resources
- [Full Specification](/llms-full.txt)
- [Documentation](https://docs.corvix.ai)
- [API Reference](https://api.corvix.ai)
- [Support](https://support.corvix.ai)
